arts.ttl: Martin Keown savages Brendan Rodgers as Celtic boss told to stop Champions League pretence and 'sort it out'
arts.sum: There was nowhere to hide for Brendan Rodgers and his side in Dortmund

arts.ttl: MOTM Poll: Karim Adeyemi Scores Hat Trick as Dortmund Decimate Celtic 7-1
arts.sum: When it looked like the second half might end scoreless, Serhou Guirassy popped up with a very impressive goal as a result from some quick footwork and a quick-taken finish inside the box. Shortly after, in the 9th minute, Dortmund found themselves level 1-1 after Daizen Maeda managed to scrape a cross across the goal line after a very suspect clearing-attempt from Emre Can. What happened next can only be described as Karim Adeyemi somehow ascending and become the one true football God no one expected he could be.

arts.ttl: Bruised Brendan Rodgers claims Celtic were 'SPOOKED' by Dortmund demolition but boss will never park the bus
arts.sum: The Irishman watched his side hammered on another chastening away night for the club in Europe

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund 7-1 Celtic: Karim Adeyemi nets first-half hat-trick in Champions League hammering
arts.sum: Celtic’s long winning run came to a shuddering halt on a dismal night in Dortmund

arts.ttl: Celtic hit for SEVEN by Borussia Dortmund in Champions League thumping
arts.sum: BORUSSIA DORTMUND 7-1 CELTIC: It was chastening night for Brendan Rodgers' hoops as German side Borussia Dortmund found their ruthless streak in front of goal

arts.ttl: The familiar Celtic failings difficult to watch as Dortmund dish out brutal Champions League lesson
arts.sum: After all the optimism and hope from nine wins in nine, Dortmund brought the Scottish champions bang down to earth with a bang in a blistering first half that left Celtic bruised. Celtic suffered their first defeat of the 2024/25 season on Tuesday night, losing 7-1 away to Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Raging Neil Lennon leathers Celtic with 6 brutal truths after Dortmund disaster BUT clears Brendan Rodgers of sins
arts.sum: The 7-1 demolition left the former Parkhead boss reeling with his former side

arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers reminds Celtic with a title warning as Rangers striker declares best is yet to come
arts.sum: The Nigeria star is only too aware that nothing is won or lost in the opening weeks of the season

arts.ttl: Celtic crash back down to earth in Champions League with 7-1 loss at Dortmund
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers’ side had won their previous 17 matches and scored 33 goals this season before arriving at Signal Iduna Park.

arts.ttl: Celtic player ratings as Greg Taylor exposed and Callum McGregor flops in Dortmund Champions League demolition
arts.sum: It was a night of misery for the Hoops in Germany as they were ruthlessly put to the sword in Dortmund
